title: Morning and Evening: Daily Readings
author: C. H. Spurgeon
tradition_notes: Spurgeon was a Particular Baptist pastor at the Metropolitan Tabernacle, London. His theology was strongly Calvinist, shaped by the Puritan tradition. Morning and Evening is his most widely used devotional work.
source_edition: CCEL digitization of Morning and Evening: Daily Readings (1865)
notes: Spurgeon died 1892 -- text is public domain in all jurisdictions. ThML source from the Christian Classics Ethereal Library. 732 entries (366 days x morning + evening, including Feb 29 leap year reading).
